body:
## Rationale

Fills the final gap in the Behemoth arc between `thelema-6-drum-setup` (#2442, 2000) and `demigod-drum-setup` (#2339, 2004). *Zos Kia Cultus (Here and Beyond)* (2002) is Behemoth's 5th studio album — it marks the full crystallisation of their symphonic/blackened-death sound and the last album before *Demigod* launched them internationally.

**Full arc (post-filing)**:
`satanica-drum-setup` (#2450, 1999) → `thelema-6-drum-setup` (#2442, 2000) → **`zos-kia-cultus-drum-setup`** (2002, this proposal) → `demigod-drum-setup` (#2339, 2004) → `the-apostasy-drum-setup` (#2385, 2007) → `evangelion-drum-setup` ✅ → `the-satanist-drum-setup` ✅

Inferno at **8.33% GSC CTR** — every article that reaches Inferno searchers has high conversion potential. Zos Kia Cultus features 'Here and Beyond', 'As Above So Below', and 'Horns ov Baphomet' — significant blast beat showcases. The album used Inferno's evolving Tama Starclassic configuration but with the first notable Meinl cymbal integration that defined his Behemoth sound from Demigod onward. Distinct gear context from Satanica (1999) and Thelema.6 (2000): the production on ZKC (Hertz Studios, Poland) changed the kit's perceived attack significantly.

**Dedup confirmed:** Searched all open seo-proposals — no prior Zos Kia Cultus proposal found. `zos-kia-cultus-drum-setup` slug absent from albumArticles.js (143 entries confirmed).

## File to create/update

**`/packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js`** — add entry `'zos-kia-cultus-drum-setup'`:
- drummer: Inferno (inferno)
- band: Behemoth
- year: 2002
- gear era: Tama Starclassic Maple + early Meinl Byzance integration (transitional era)
- `relatedAlbums: ['thelema-6-drum-setup', 'demigod-drum-setup', 'whats-in-infernos-kit']`
- FAQPage JSON-LD with ≥3 Q&A pairs

**`/public/llms/articles/zos-kia-cultus-drum-setup.md`** — AI-citation-ready markdown.

## Quality gate

- `/articles/zos-kia-cultus-drum-setup` resolves with 200
- Gear breakdown distinguishes Tama/Meinl configuration from Satanica era
- FAQPage JSON-LD present with ≥3 pairs
- All `relatedAlbums` slugs exist in albumArticles.js
- LLM file created at `/public/llms/articles/zos-kia-cultus-drum-setup.md`

## Verify

```bash
curl -s https://metalforge.io/articles/zos-kia-cultus-drum-setup | grep -c 'Inferno'
# > 0

node -e "import('./packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js').then(m => console.log('zos-kia-cultus-drum-setup' in m.ALBUM_ARTICLES))"
# true
```
title: SEO: Behemoth 'Zos Kia Cultus' drum setup article (Inferno, 2002 — fills Thelema.6→Demigod arc gap, symphonic-death transition)
resolution: albumArticles.js entry (lines 47530–47804) and LLM markdown at /public/llms/articles/zos-kia-cultus-drum-setup.md both present and validated. Entry has Tama Starclassic Maple + Meinl Byzance gear, 5 FAQ pairs, FAQPage JSON-LD with 3 Q&As, relatedAlbums all verified present.
